summary: Fix approval-center duplicate admin pending rows and contain expanded approval-chain width.

notes: No schema or data migration is required.
Production diagnosis confirmed the reported duplicate row came from one active approval node with multiple pending assignees, not duplicate timesheets.
Admin pending tasks are deduplicated by approval node while preserving the actionable task id.
Expanded review rows constrain table-cell width so approval-chain cards scroll inside the detail area.
Pending, in-progress, and reviewed row expansion keys are isolated to prevent React state/key collisions.
Added a Playwright regression for duplicate review rows, expand/collapse behavior, and document-level horizontal overflow.

verification: After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.1.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/.
After deploy, run the review-approval-layout Playwright regression against https://xpjs.asia/.
known_warnings: ESLint still reports existing warnings in dashboard/ui/TimesheetPage files, but exits 0.
Vite still warns that the main index chunk is larger than 500 kB.
